resources.title: 1개 아이디어 → 5개 플랫폼 콘텐츠 변환

resources.command: claude '아이디어: AI가 업무를 대체하는 것이 아니라 업그레이드한다. 이것을 블로그·링크드인·인스타·트위터·유튜브 스크립트로 각각 만들어줘'

resources.title: SEO 최적화 블로그 포스트 파이프라인
resources.description: 키워드 리서치 → 목차 → 본문 → 메타 디스크립션 → 내부 링크 전략까지 AI와 함께 완전한 SEO 포스트 완성
resources.command: claude '키워드: AI 업무 자동화. 1) 검색 의도 분석 2) SEO 목차 3) 본문 2000자 4) 메타 디스크립션 순서로 작성해줘'

quiz.question: What is the primary focus of the AI content creation pipeline described in the course?
options: Creating AI-generated content for various platforms
Building a social media marketing strategy
quiz.explanation: The course focuses on building an End-to-End pipeline for creating AI-generated content for platforms like blogs, YouTube, and social media.

quiz.question: Which tool is mentioned for designing images and videos using AI?
quiz.explanation: Canva Magic Studio is specifically mentioned as a tool for design, image, and video creation using AI.

quiz.question: What is the purpose of the multi-format practice mentioned in the content?
options: To convert a single insight into various content formats
To develop a comprehensive marketing plan
To create a database of AI tools
quiz.explanation: The multi-format practice is intended to transform a single core insight into scripts for different platforms such as blogs and social media.

practicePrompts.label: Create Blog Outline
practicePrompts.instruction: Generate a blog post outline based on a keyword.
practicePrompts.prompt: Create a detailed outline for a blog post about 'The Benefits of AI in Content Creation'.
practicePrompts.followUp: Now write the introduction section of the blog post.

practicePrompts.label: Design a Social Media Post
practicePrompts.instruction: Use AI to design a social media post.
practicePrompts.prompt: Generate a catchy Instagram post caption for a new AI tool that enhances productivity.
practicePrompts.followUp: Create a visual concept for the post using Canva Magic Studio.

practicePrompts.label: Convert Text to Speech
practicePrompts.instruction: Transform a written script into an audio format.
practicePrompts.prompt: Convert the following text into a natural-sounding AI voice narration: 'Welcome to our channel where we explore the latest in AI technology.'
practicePrompts.followUp: Try using a different tone or style for the narration.

evaluation.prompt: Paste your output, command result, or notes here and AI will evaluate whether your learning result matches the lesson goal.
evaluation.context: This learning topic is "AI 콘텐츠 제작 파이프라인". 블로그·유튜브·SNS·뉴스레터를 AI로 제작하는 End-to-End 파이프라인 구축 실전 과정
successCriteria: The learner completed a concrete practice step
The result matches the main lesson objective
The learner can explain or verify what happened
commonMistakes: Only reading the lesson without trying the practice step
Posting an incomplete command or partial result
Confusing setup issues with the lesson outcome
